title: Best FPS
description: BEST FPS is a lightweight Minecraft modpack focused purely on performance. It includes only essential FPS-boosting mods and required by community, keeping the experience close to vanilla while maximizing frame rates.
body:
# ⚡ BEST FPS  
**Nothing but Performance. Pure Speed. Zero Bloat.**

Tired of “optimization” packs bloated with useless mods?  
**BEST FPS** is a **hardcore FPS-only modpack**, built for **maximum frames with minimum system load**.

No visuals.  
Just **pure performance**.

## Vanilla gameplay enhanced with widely-used mods!
---

## 🔥 Why Choose BEST FPS?
- **FPS-only modpack** — nothing extra, nothing useless  
- Only **28 FPS-boosting mods + essential mods**   (may differ on versions)
- **Zero bloat**, zero gimmicks  
- Optimized for **low-end, old & mid-range PCs**  
- Perfect for **PvP, servers, and competitive play**

---

## ⚡ Insane Performance Gains  
**Tested on:**  
💻 **Intel i3 (2nd Gen)**  
🛠️ **8GB DDR3 RAM**  
🎮 **Intel HD Graphics**  
🐧 **Linux**

✅ **Massive FPS boost & smoother gameplay!**

⚡ **Max Frames. Minimum Load.**

---

<details>
<summary>Planned Versions</summary>

- **1.16.5**  
- **1.18.2**  
- **1.19.4**  
- **1.20.1**  
- **1.21.x (Active Support)**

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Recommended Settings</summary>

For best performance, tweak **CPU Render Ahead Limit** based on your system.  
Try values between **1–9** and choose what gives the highest stable FPS.

*Low-end PCs usually benefit from lower values.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>Benchmarks</summary>

> ### **Test System**
> - 💻 **Intel i3 (2nd Gen)**  
> - 🛠️ **8GB DDR3 RAM**  
> - 🎮 **Intel HD Graphics**  
> - 🐧 **Linux**
>
> ### **Results**
> - **Before:** ~30-40 FPS  
> - **After:** 90-120 (we dont show fake benchmarks only legit)🚀 **Significant FPS increase & stable frame times**

*Results may vary by system.*

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>📦 Included Mods (FPS-Only)</summary>

> ### ⚡ **Performance Mods**
> - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)  
> - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)  
> - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)  
> - [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations)  
> - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)  
> - any many more
>
> ### 🔒 **Policy**
> - **Only essential FPS mods**  
> - **No QoL mods**  
> - **No visual mods**  
> - **Zero bloat**

</details>

---

⚡ **BEST FPS — Nothing but Performance. Pure Speed. Zero Bloat.**
